---
title: "Meghana Murthy"
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/meghana-v-murthy/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/55megh
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
      href: mailto:mvmeghana9@gmail.com
---

::: {#bio}
Hi there! I'm Meghana, a Data Scientist and Business Analytics professional 
with over six years of experience in the IT industry. My journey began in 
ETL development, specialising in Informatica and data warehousing at 
organisations like Infosys and Cognizant. Today, as a Master's candidate 
at Dublin City University, I am bridging the gap between complex data 
engineering and strategic business intelligence.
:::
